title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Ceylon cinnamon essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antibacterial properties, which can combat the growth of harmful bacteria in the mouth that contribute to gum disease. The oil's anti-inflammatory compounds also reduce swelling and alleviate pain, allowing for a healthier and more comfortable gum environment. Additionally, Ceylon cinnamon's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals, promoting tissue healing and preventing further damage. By ...
